name: Returned of the Tistina
name_jp: ティスティナの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>還</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かえ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>り<ruby lang="jp"><rb>仔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ご</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If this card is in your hand: You can target 1 "Tistina" monster you control, except "Returned of the Tistina"; Special Summon this card, and if you do, its Level becomes that targeted monster's Level. If this card is in your GY: You can target 1 Aqua Xyz Monster you control; attach this card to it as material. You can only use each effect of "Returned of the Tistina" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is in your hand: You can target 1 "Tistina" monster you control, except "Returned of the Tistina"; Special Summon this card, and if you do, its Level becomes that targeted monster's Level. If this card is in your GY: You can target 1 Aqua Xyz Monster you control; attach this card to it as material. You can only use each effect of "Returned of the Tistina" once per turn.
eff: If this card is in your hand: You can target 1 "Tistina" monster you control, except "Returned of the Tistina"; Special Summon this card, and if you do, its Level becomes that targeted monster's Level. If this card is in your GY: You can target 1 Aqua Xyz Monster you control; attach this card to it as material. You can only use each effect of "Returned of the Tistina" once per turn.

action: Attaches itself from your Graveyard as Xyz Material
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
